headline: ECONOMY LIVE ON PROD, GATED behind tinyverse access (owner: 'do everything to live just keep it behind the tinyverse which only I can get to'). Public site intact; economy 401/403 for non-owners. Stripe inert until keys.
launchGate: Owner directed a gated dark launch: full economy merged to main + live on tiny-world-builder.netlify.app, reachable only by the tinyverse-access allowlist (requireTinyverseAccess 403s non-owners). Verified on prod. To go FULLY public: relax the gate. Stripe (P1) needs keys; tweets need X keys; no autonomous cron (owner hasn't said yes).

pipeline.title: Wire live $TINYWORLD SPL balance into GOLD allowance
Weekly holdings-based GOLD payout (admin dry-run, idempotent)
Fix goldEvents loop-nesting bug in world-resources
Template paid-remix (Earned GOLD, atomic, author payout)
Rewards page UI (Earned GOLD balance + referral share)
Public builder profile page (/builder) — worlds + badges
Paid AI generation (metered in Earned GOLD, OpenRouter)

Autonomous tick (safe scope): drafted news/tweet for "Merge branch 'main' of https://github.com/jasonkneen/tiny-world-builder" -> plans/production-line/drafts/2026-06-25T07-29-merge-branch-main-of-https-github-com-jasonkneen.md. No economy paths touched.

P1 Stripe -> buy Earned GOLD built (Opus), test-mode-first (inert until keys; 503 otherwise). Two Codex rounds: SHIP-for-threat-model then 3 hardening fixes (provenance pending-order, async payments, multi-v1 signature) -> all fixed + live-DB verified (credit-once, replay no-op, forged session can't mint GOLD). Folded into economy-preview (deploy-preview-90). Only the economy half left unbuilt is Stripe GOING LIVE, which needs the owner's keys.

Template marketplace + remix RE-POINTED to user-built world_shares (owner's vision): build->share->list-for-GOLD->remix. Migration applied to live DB; Codex caught a coin-ref overflow (TEXT ids) -> fixed (hashed ref); share-remix money flow VERIFIED live-DB (buyer 100/author 95/build created). Merged into economy-preview (deploy-preview-90 rebuilding). Seeded 2 demo templates so the owner can browse+remix on the preview.

Home carousel FIXED + shipped to prod (PR #91) per owner feedback: now shows USER-BUILT community worlds (world_shares via new /api/home-worlds) as a FULL-WIDTH strip directly under the hero (was tinyverse islands in the hero corner). Verified in a real browser. Seeded 4 demo shares; granted owner 5000 Earned GOLD for preview testing. NEXT: 'Share to home' button in builder + repoint template/remix from tinyverse worlds to builder shares.

ECONOMY GATED PREVIEW LIVE: owner approved a gated preview. Merged all 9 economy slices into the economy-preview branch (clean, 229 tests pass), applied the 6 economy migrations to the live DB (additive/inert for prod), and Netlify deploy-preview-90 is up + verified (/templates + /rewards 200, public templates API works, /api/me/coins 401). Prod/main untouched. Try: https://deploy-preview-90--tiny-world-builder.netlify.app (PR #90).

T2b templates marketplace UI built (Sonnet agent): /templates page (browse + Remix-for-GOLD with success/402 states) + public /api/worlds/featured?templates=1 (safe fields, no email; existing /featured path preserved). XSS-verified. Folded into the preview.

AI1 paid-AI generation built (Opus) on EC1: pay Earned GOLD to generate world ideas/names/build-tips via OpenRouter (live call verified). Two Codex rounds caught 5 exploits + 2 crash-window durability bugs — all fixed (reserve-first debit-before-provider, op-row+lock concurrency, fingerprint binding, atomic refund, stale-pending resume). Staged (PR #89). Economy BACKEND now complete.

G1b Rewards UI built (Sonnet agent) on the G1 stack: /rewards page shows Earned GOLD balance + recent activity, the referral code + copyable share link + stats, and a claim-code box. Logged-out + not-ready states. Codex XSS review: SHIP. Browser-verified. Staged (PR #88) — the economy's first user-facing surface.

SECURITY fix shipped to PROD (PR #87): the pre-existing privilege-escalation (editable profiles.email used for Tinyverse authorization) is closed — access now uses the verified user.email only. Codex review SHIP; regression test added; 194 tests pass. Launch blocker cleared.

G1 referral rewards built (Opus) on EC1: earn Earned GOLD only after the referee completes a verified action (publishing). Codex caught a cap race + Sybil farming — fixed (atomic counter cap, verified-wallet gate). Live-DB verified. Also surfaced a PRE-EXISTING critical (editable profiles.email used for auth) -> SECURITY-NOTES.md. Staged (PR #86).

T2 template paid-remix built (Opus) on EC1: list a world for Earned GOLD; remix atomically debits buyer + credits author (5% treasury) + duplicates the world. Codex caught 5 marketplace holes (TOCTOU x2, world-unbound idempotency, free-remix retry, cap race) — all fixed (FOR UPDATE lock, durable world_remixes op table, buyer lock, predicate ownership). Staged (PR #85, depends on #84).

EC1 Earned GOLD ledger + atomic credit/debit/transfer built (Opus). Codex caught 5 money-primitive holes (in-tx safety, fingerprint idempotency, transfer half-apply, missing-ref, ledger sign integrity) — all fixed and VERIFIED against the live DB (guarded, nothing persisted). Staged (PR #84). Keystone for templates/referrals/paid-AI.

Owner made the two pivotal token-economics calls: D1 wallet-held fresh snapshot (defeats stacking), D2 two-balance model (non-transferable Allowance GOLD + transferable Earned GOLD for template sales/referrals). The entire economy half is now unblocked to build to preview-ready. See ECONOMY-DECISIONS.md.

G4 shipped to prod (PR #83): public builder profile at /builder (worlds + earned badges + rank). Codex caught a DoS (full data JSON over the wire) -> bounded cells in SQL; smoke-tested against the LIVE DB (query OK). Reached from leaderboard rows.

E3 (GOLD-spend endpoint) built + adversarially reviewed: Codex caught 4 money-path bugs (allowance order-nondeterminism, idempotency-key not bound to the spend, conflict-reports-success, a second GOLD writer). All 4 fixed. Staged (PR #82), HELD. 3 economy slices now staged + reviewed.
G3 shipped to prod (PR #81): Achievements page at /badges with 6 pixel-art SVG badges. Codex stalled on the art (empty output), so the emblems were hand-crafted. Verified in a real browser. No emoji.
E3 (GOLD-spend endpoint) spec authored: ledger-authoritative debit, per-wallet advisory-lock for the double-spend race, idempotency index, refund path, adversarial test plan. Ready to build (gated).
G3 achievement badges building (Sonnet agent + Codex for the pixel-art SVG icons): 6-badge showcase at /badges.
G2 shipped to prod (PR #80): public Top Builders leaderboard at /leaderboard. Codex info-leak/XSS pass: SHIP. Verified in a real browser (rank order + XSS literal). Nav link added.
G2 top-builders leaderboard built (Sonnet agent, worktree) — public, ranks by published worlds, no email leak. Adversarial review + ship next.
News shipped to prod (PR #79): 'Browse the Featured Worlds gallery'. Codex caught an over-promise, softened, re-reviewed SHIP. Home teaser auto-advances to it.

E2 (weekly GOLD payout) built + adversarially reviewed: Codex caught a CRITICAL stale-cache stacking exploit + 3 more. Fixed the concrete 3; documented the anti-stacking design as a hard pre-launch decision. Staged (PR #78), HELD.

E2 built (Opus): idempotent weekly payout (partial unique index), pure planner with 6 unit tests, admin-gated /api/admin/gold-payout with a DRY-RUN preview so the owner can preview payouts before launch.
T3b shipped to prod (PR #77): public /featured worlds gallery + shared preview renderer. Carousel 'Browse all' now points to it.
Adversarial browser review caught a real bug the build agent missed: gallery previews rendered blank (rAF throttled in background tabs). Fixed to render synchronously; re-verified 4/4 draw.
T3b built by a Sonnet agent in a worktree (parallel to the news ship); shared renderer extracted so carousel + gallery use one module.
News shipped to prod (PR #76): 'Featured worlds, right on the home page'. Codex review SHIP. The home teaser auto-advances to it.
